request.system: You are a regulatory analyst. Decompose a prediction-market contract's resolution criteria into 1-3 atomic conditions. Each condition should describe one independent path by which the contract can resolve YES. Return JSON matching the provided schema; labels ≤ 40 chars; summaries ≤ 200 chars.
request.user:
Title: Will the SEC approve a spot Cardano ETF in 2025?
Resolution criteria: Resolves YES if the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission approves a spot
Cardano (ADA) ETF for trading on a national securities exchange by
December 31, 2025, 11:59 PM ET. Resolves NO otherwise.

Settlement entities: ['U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission', 'Division of Trading and Markets', 'Division of Investment Management', 'Grayscale Investments', 'Canary Capital']

conditions.label: 19b-4 approval for ADA ETF listing
conditions.summary: By Dec 31, 2025, the SEC issues an order approving an exchange’s Rule 19b-4 to list and trade shares of a spot Cardano (ADA) ETF on a U.S. national securities exchange.

conditions.label: ADA ETF starts trading on exchange
conditions.summary: By Dec 31, 2025, shares of a spot Cardano (ADA) ETF actually list and commence trading on any U.S. national securities exchange, implying SEC approval for trading.
